description: Directed venue management operations, successfully coordinating with external vendors to oversee event setup, thematic decoration, and seamless logistical execution.
Achieved the highest volume of team registrations across the region, surpassing all other Campus Directors for this premier flagship event.
Co-founded a competitive robotics team, architecting and deploying robots for prominent national competitions including Mechcellence 1.0 and Chittagong Science Carnival 2.0.

Maintained active affiliations and engaged with several prominent student associations, including the Supply Chain and Business Alliances (SCBA), Robo Mechatronics Association (RMA), and American Society of Mechanical Engineers (ASME).
